hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; ext="${file##*.}"; if [ "$ext" = "ts" ] || [ "$ext" = "tsx" ] || [ "$ext" = "js" ] || [ "$ext" = "jsx" ]; then npx next lint --fix --file "$file" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(env|lock)$|^\.env' && echo 'BLOCK: Cannot edit .env or lock files — these are protected.' && exit 1 || exit 0

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(app/\(dashboard\)|app/\(auth\)/callback|lib/supabase/server)' && grep -q 'supabase/client' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCK: Server file imports @/lib/supabase/client — use @/lib/supabase/server (createServerSupabaseClient) instead.' && exit 1; fi; exit 0
